meta.title: Kuldeepsinh Jhala | Full Stack Developer (Node.js & AWS)
meta.subtitle: End-to-end software engineer building scalable, secure, cloud-native systems
meta.description: Personal portfolio of Kuldeepsinh Jhala, a software engineer with 2+ years of experience delivering complete software solutions — from requirements gathering to AWS cloud deployment — with strong backend, frontend, and system design expertise.

hero.name: Kuldeepsinh Jhala
hero.tagline: Designing, building, and deploying complete software systems on the cloud
hero.subtitle: Backend-focused full stack engineer with strong frontend development and AWS deployment experience.
hero.description: I am a software engineer experienced in delivering end-to-end software solutions — from understanding client requirements and designing system architecture to building secure, scalable applications and deploying them on AWS cloud infrastructure. My work focuses on clean and maintainable code, scalable backend systems, well-structured frontend applications, and production-ready deployments.

stats.label: Years of Experience
stats.description: Professional experience building, deploying, and maintaining full stack software systems.

stats.label: End-to-End Deployments
stats.description: Projects delivered from requirements gathering to AWS cloud deployment.

stats.label: Cloud Projects
stats.description: Production deployments using AWS EC2, RDS, dynamoDB, lambda functions, and S3.

items.title: AI Applications with LLMs
items.description: Design and build applications powered by large language models to solve real-world problems. Work includes prompt design, data processing pipelines, API integration, and building systems that convert unstructured information into structured outputs and actionable insights.

items.title: End-to-End Software Delivery
items.description: Translate client requirements into complete software systems. Handle architecture design, backend development (Node.js), frontend interfaces (React), database design (MSSQL/DynamoDB), AWS deployment (Lambda, EC2, RDS, S3), logging, and full technical documentation.

items.title: Scalable Backend Architecture
items.description: Build scalable backend systems using Node.js with a clean layered architecture (routes, controllers, services, repositories, models). Develop secure REST APIs with JWT authentication and role-based access control. Design efficient database structures using MSSQL, ORM, and stored procedures, while implementing proper logging, error handling, and maintainable documentation.

items.title: AWS Production Deployments
items.description: Deploy and manage production applications on AWS using EC2, RDS, S3, and Lambda. Configure servers, manage databases, handle environment setup, monitoring, logging, and maintain secure and reliable cloud infrastructure for scalable applications.

items.title: Frontend Performance & Structure
items.description: Build structured React applications with clear component separation and maintainable codebases. Implement validations, basic security practices, and optimize performance through efficient state management and reusable components while considering SEO-friendly structure and accessibility.
